mapper.select: SELECT A.application_id AS "applicationId", A.fk_memberid AS "jobseekerMemberId", J.fk_memberid AS "companyMemberId", J.job_id AS "jobId" FROM tbl_job_application A JOIN tbl_job_posting J ON A.fk_job_id = J.job_id WHERE A.application_id = #{applicationId} AND A.application_status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_chat_room WHERE room_type = 'APPLICATION' AND fk_application_id = #{applicationId} AND room_status = 1
SELECT room_id FROM tbl_chat_room WHERE room_type = 'APPLICATION' AND fk_application_id = #{applicationId} AND room_status = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_chat_room_id.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO tbl_chat_room ( room_id, room_type, fk_application_id, fk_offer_submit_id, fk_job_id, fk_company_memberid, fk_jobseeker_memberid, created_by, room_status, last_message_preview, last_message_at, created_at, closed_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{roomType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{offerSubmitId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{jobId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{companyMemberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobseekerMemberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, NULL, NULL, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT room_id AS roomId, room_type AS roomType, fk_application_id AS applicationId, fk_offer_submit_id AS offerSubmitId, fk_job_id AS jobId, fk_company_memberid AS companyMemberId, fk_jobseeker_memberid AS jobseekerMemberId, created_by AS createdBy, room_status AS roomStatus, last_message_preview AS lastMessagePreview, TO_CHAR(last_message_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastMessageAt, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(closed_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS closedAt FROM tbl_chat_room WHERE room_id = #{roomId}

SELECT R.room_id AS roomId, R.fk_application_id AS applicationId, JP.title AS jobTitle,
CASE WHEN R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = #{memberId} THEN R.fk_company_memberid ELSE R.fk_jobseeker_memberid END AS opponentId,
CASE WHEN R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = #{memberId} THEN C.company_name ELSE M.name END AS opponentName,
NULL AS opponentProfile,
R.last_message_preview AS lastMessage, TO_CHAR(R.last_message_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS lastMessageAt,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_chat_message CM WHERE CM.fk_room_id = R.room_id AND CM.deleted_yn = 0 AND CM.sender_memberid != #{memberId} AND CM.message_id > NVL( ( SELECT CR.last_read_message_id FROM tbl_chat_read CR WHERE CR.fk_room_id = R.room_id AND CR.fk_memberid = #{memberId} ), 0 ) ) AS unreadCount
FROM tbl_chat_room R LEFT JOIN tbl_member M ON R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = M.memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_company C ON R.fk_company_memberid = C.fk_memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_job_posting JP ON R.fk_job_id = JP.job_id WHERE R.room_status = 1 AND ( R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = #{memberId} OR R.fk_company_memberid = #{memberId} ) ORDER BY NVL(R.last_message_at, R.created_at) DESC, R.room_id DESC

SELECT R.room_id AS roomId, R.fk_application_id AS applicationId, JP.title AS jobTitle,
CASE WHEN R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = #{memberId} THEN R.fk_company_memberid ELSE R.fk_jobseeker_memberid END AS opponentId,
CASE WHEN R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = #{memberId} THEN C.company_name ELSE M.name END AS opponentName,
NULL AS opponentProfile,
R.last_message_preview AS lastMessage, TO_CHAR(R.last_message_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS lastMessageAt,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_chat_message CM WHERE CM.fk_room_id = R.room_id AND CM.deleted_yn = 0 AND CM.sender_memberid != #{memberId} AND CM.message_id > NVL( ( SELECT CR.last_read_message_id FROM tbl_chat_read CR WHERE CR.fk_room_id = R.room_id AND CR.fk_memberid = #{memberId} ), 0 ) ) AS unreadCount
FROM tbl_chat_room R LEFT JOIN tbl_member M ON R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = M.memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_company C ON R.fk_company_memberid = C.fk_memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_job_posting JP ON R.fk_job_id = JP.job_id WHERE R.room_id = #{roomId} AND R.room_status = 1 AND ( R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = #{memberId} OR R.fk_company_memberid = #{memberId} )

SELECT R.room_id AS roomId, R.fk_application_id AS applicationId, R.fk_job_id AS jobId, R.room_type AS roomType,
JP.title AS jobTitle,
CASE WHEN R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = #{memberId} THEN R.fk_company_memberid ELSE R.fk_jobseeker_memberid END AS opponentId,
CASE WHEN R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = #{memberId} THEN NVL(C.company_name, CM.community_company_name) ELSE M.name END AS opponentName,
NULL AS opponentProfile
FROM tbl_chat_room R LEFT JOIN tbl_job_posting JP ON R.fk_job_id = JP.job_id LEFT JOIN tbl_member M ON R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = M.memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_member CM ON R.fk_company_memberid = CM.memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_company C ON R.fk_company_memberid = C.fk_memberid
WHERE R.room_id = #{roomId} AND R.room_status = 1 AND ( R.fk_jobseeker_memberid = #{memberId} OR R.fk_company_memberid = #{memberId} )
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_chat_message_id.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO tbl_chat_message ( message_id, fk_room_id, sender_memberid, message_type, content, deleted_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{roomId}, #{senderMemberId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, 0, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT message_id AS messageId, fk_room_id AS roomId, sender_memberid AS senderMemberId, message_type AS messageType, content AS content, deleted_yn AS deletedYn, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM tbl_chat_message WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
SELECT MAX(message_id) FROM tbl_chat_message WHERE fk_room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_yn = 0

SELECT fk_room_id AS roomId, fk_memberid AS memberId, last_read_message_id AS lastReadMessageId, TO_CHAR(last_read_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastReadAt, TO_CHAR(updated_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt FROM tbl_chat_read WHERE fk_room_id = #{roomId} AND fk_memberid = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_chat_read ( fk_room_id, fk_memberid, last_read_message_id, last_read_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{memberId}, #{lastReadMessageId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_chat_room SET last_message_preview = #{lastMessagePreview}, last_message_at = SYSDATE WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_status = 1
